seoTitle: Ungarra vs Unley Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ungarra and Unley Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ungarra vs Unley Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ungarra and Unley Park.
heading: Ungarra vs Unley Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ungarra, South Australia and Unley Park, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ungarra has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Unley Park (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ungarra or Unley Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ungarra has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Unley Park scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ungarra scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Unley Park scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ungarra or Unley Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ungarra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
